channel.title: GitHub ABAP Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of ABAP in GitHub

item.title: SAP-samples/abap-cheat-sheets
item.description: Explore ABAP syntax in a nutshell supported by executable demo examples.

item.title: SAP/code-pal-for-abap
item.description: code pal for ABAP is a highly configurable engine, fully integrated into the ABAP development framework ensuring Cloud’s built-in quality.
